title: Asteroschoenus consanguineus
taxonomy: Asteroschoenus consanguineus is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other sedges. The genus Asteroschoenus is a group of sedges that are native to Australia and New Zealand. Within the family Cyperaceae, Asteroschoenus consanguineus is further classified into the subfamily Cyperoideae. The exact classification may vary depending on the taxonomic source and the methods used for classification.
